title: justicia zamorensis
intro: Justicia zamorensis, also known as Zamorano or Yacuba, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America. The leaves of the Justicia zamorensis plant contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Justicia zamorensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to help alleviate coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions.
